# ɳTasks App Store Listing

## App Name
ɳTasks

## Short Description (80 chars)
Self-hosted task management. Your data, your server, your rules.

## Full Description

ɳTasks is an open-source task management app that connects to your own self-hosted backend. No cloud accounts, no subscriptions for storage, no data harvesting. You own everything.

Built on nSelf, ɳTasks gives you:

- Create, edit, and organize tasks with due dates and priorities
- Share tasks with other users on your server
- Public and private task lists
- Offline support with automatic sync when reconnected
- Push notifications for due dates and shared task updates
- Multi-backend support: works with nSelf, Supabase, Nhost, or Bolt
- Dark and light themes
- Available on iOS, Android, macOS, Linux, and Windows

Set up your backend in five minutes with the nSelf CLI, then connect ɳTasks to start organizing. Or use the free hosted version at task.nself.org.

## Keywords
tasks, todo, self-hosted, productivity, nself, task management, open source, privacy

## Category
Productivity

## Content Rating
Everyone / 4+

## Screenshots Required
1. Home screen with task list (light + dark)
2. Task detail/edit screen
3. Shared tasks view
4. Settings/backend connection screen
5. Empty state with onboarding
6. Notification example (optional)

## Dimensions
- iOS: 1290x2796 (iPhone 15 Pro Max), 2048x2732 (iPad Pro 12.9)
- Android: 1080x1920 minimum, 1440x2560 preferred
